properties.name: app.mail.from
properties.description: From address used for all outgoing emails.

properties.name: app.mail.app-name
properties.description: Application name used in email subjects and bodies.

properties.name: app.password-reset.token-expiration-ms
properties.description: Password-reset token TTL in milliseconds (default 15 min).

properties.name: app.password-reset.reset-url-base
properties.description: Base URL for the password-reset page on the frontend.

properties.name: app.email-verification.token-expiration-ms
properties.description: Email-verification token TTL in milliseconds (default 24 h).

properties.name: app.email-verification.verify-url-base
properties.description: Base URL for the email-verification page on the frontend.
